policy: mechanism-transfer registry; no biological overclaiming; no direct stable-memory writes

entries.mechanism: compact indexing, goal-gated recall, temporal binding, mismatch-gated updates, emotion modulation, and replay as weight
entries.xinyu_problem: memory recall and memory write pressure need source-backed boundaries instead of transcript dumping or mood-made facts
entries.xinyu_mapping: xinyu_neuro_memory_rules, canonical living memory recall, temporal memory context, emotion council
entries.risk_boundary: engineering analogy only; does not imply biological memory, consciousness, or real emotion
entries.minimal_test: tests/test_neuro_memory_rules.py validates sources, boundaries, flow mappings, and emotion trace notes
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: keeps recall compact, time-aware, and bounded against emotion-created facts

entries.mechanism: feedback loop, error classification, correction, stability, and overcorrection guard
entries.xinyu_problem: reply failures can be patched locally without a durable next-turn correction loop
entries.xinyu_mapping: classify visible reply errors and feed a bounded policy hint into the next turn
entries.risk_boundary: one correction can create replay or policy residue, but cannot rewrite stable persona or owner memory
entries.minimal_test: bad prior reply plus owner correction produces task_miss, tone_miss, memory_miss, or boundary_miss
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: reduces repeated failures and turns owner corrections into testable repair paths

entries.mechanism: sort urgent and important lanes before detailed treatment
entries.xinyu_problem: short owner commands and mixed turns need priority sorting before recall, tools, or reply expansion
entries.xinyu_mapping: turn_triage_gate selects a primary lane and secondary lanes before downstream providers
entries.risk_boundary: triage advises priority; it does not suppress explicit owner instructions or replace Scene Frame
entries.minimal_test: continue/start/next resolves to active task; correction outranks stale memory; low-energy context suppresses optional expansion
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: makes terse live commands and mixed-priority turns more reliable

entries.mechanism: danger signals, quarantine, tolerance, and controlled response
entries.xinyu_problem: external sources, group chat, stale memory, and hallucinated replies can contaminate stable memory
entries.xinyu_mapping: memory_immune_gate classifies candidates as allow_review, quarantine, reject, needs_owner_confirmation, or safe_as_library_only
entries.risk_boundary: quarantine is review, not destructive deletion; too much rejection must not block learning
entries.minimal_test: group-only fact cannot enter owner-private memory; public article cannot rewrite persona or relationship memory
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: protects stable memory while still allowing reviewed learning

entries.mechanism: slow predictive regulation across the whole system
entries.xinyu_problem: fatigue, guardedness, curiosity, and closeness are too turn-local
entries.xinyu_mapping: slow_state_modulator decays state over time and influences reply energy, initiative threshold, recall threshold, and emotion bias
entries.risk_boundary: slow state modulates thresholds and pacing; it cannot create facts or override current owner text
entries.minimal_test: night-shift fatigue persists briefly and decays; repeated owner dismissal raises proactive threshold
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: makes XinYu feel more continuous without turning mood into fact

entries.mechanism: niche, competition, dormancy, pruning, succession, and resilience
entries.xinyu_problem: modules and memories accumulate unless each has a role, activity signal, and retirement rule
entries.xinyu_mapping: module_ecology_audit classifies code and memory lanes as kept, merged, dormant, archive_candidate, or delete_candidate
entries.risk_boundary: no archive/delete without reference checks, validation evidence, and recovery path
entries.minimal_test: referenced module cannot be delete_candidate; duplicate module family becomes merge candidate
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: continues the subtractive goal by making module survival explicit

entries.mechanism: evidence grade, review, appeal, reversal, and burden of proof
entries.xinyu_problem: stable memory promotion needs clearer proof standards
entries.xinyu_mapping: memory_evidence_grade labels candidate memory before promotion or quarantine
entries.risk_boundary: evidence labels support review; no direct stable memory write from sidecars
entries.minimal_test: owner explicit statement outranks inference; emotion residue cannot become fact
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: makes memory promotion explainable and reversible

entries.mechanism: facets, subject headings, controlled vocabulary, and catalog metadata
entries.xinyu_problem: memory, library, cases, and runtime state need clearer retrieval metadata
entries.xinyu_mapping: memory_facet_index adds source, scope, time, sensitivity, use case, and stability facets
entries.risk_boundary: facets organize references; they must not copy private memory bodies into public library records
entries.minimal_test: retrieval can filter by scope, sensitivity, source type, and time before keyword fallback
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: makes library and memory separation operational instead of folder-only

entries.mechanism: information scent, expected gain, and search cost
entries.xinyu_problem: retrieval and external search can run when the current turn needs a direct answer
entries.xinyu_mapping: retrieval_scent_budget decides when to continue, stop, or fallback
entries.risk_boundary: budgeting controls search effort; it cannot hide uncertainty or skip required evidence
entries.minimal_test: obvious direct answer avoids extra retrieval; ambiguous recall follows high-scent sources
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: reduces over-retrieval and keeps responses timely

entries.mechanism: near-miss logging, checklist, and preoccupation with failure
entries.xinyu_problem: serious reply, memory, or tool failures are not always converted into replay cases
entries.xinyu_mapping: near_miss_replay_queue records redacted failure metadata for future regression tests
entries.risk_boundary: near-miss records must be redacted and must not store raw QQ/private memory bodies
entries.minimal_test: final guard failure records redacted replay metadata and no private body
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: turns failures into durable tests instead of one-off fixes

entries.mechanism: cognition distributed across person, artifacts, tools, and environment
entries.xinyu_problem: XinYu operates through owner, memory, QQ, Desktop, Codex, tools, and attachments rather than one model alone
entries.xinyu_mapping: distributed_context_map records the scoped role of active external artifacts in the current turn
entries.risk_boundary: mapping describes roles; it must not expand permissions or imply hidden surveillance
entries.minimal_test: Codex task, attachment, QQ rich context, and desktop state each get scoped current-turn roles
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: makes tool/artifact participation explicit and bounded

entries.mechanism: subtext, timing, reaction, silence, and character arc
entries.xinyu_problem: living surface can degrade into explanation or templates
entries.xinyu_mapping: living_surface_replay_eval checks currentness, relation, restraint, and specificity
entries.risk_boundary: extract response structure only; do not create roleplay scripts or fixed lines
entries.minimal_test: bad replies fail for overexplaining, roleplay script shape, or lack of current-turn specificity
entries.owner_runtime_benefit: improves visible reply shape without adding persona lore
